title: calamagrostis epigejos var. intermedia
intro: Calamagrostis epigejos var. intermedia, also known as a variant of the woodland grass or a intermediate form of the tickle grass, is a type of grass native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calamagrostis epigejos var. intermedia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and possibly aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the dried leaves and flowers in hot water or oil, creating a soothing tea or topical treatment.
